text: A district judge sanctioned defendants’ attorney Raja Rajan $5,000 under Rule 11(c) for his repeated improper use of generative AI in filings — his second such violation. The court rejected his plea for a lighter penalty, noting prior sanctions exceeding $73,000.
ai_system_name: Unnamed generative AI (ChatGPT referenced in order)
canonical_source_conflicted: Genuine case law; Rule 11 duty of inquiry
mitigation_gap: Failed to verify AI output despite a prior sanction and the court’s standing order on AI use.
reliance_or_harm: Repeat submission of unverified AI-derived filings; escalating sanctions.
